summary: Frontend-only e2e validation of Sprint C — Filtres et catégorisation par type membre (Versoix). 7 of 9 tests verified end-to-end via the deployed preview URL after login + club switch to Versoix. CRITICAL FINDING: Coach section is completely MISSING from /attendance page — neither data-testid='attendance-section-coach' nor data-testid='attendance-coaches-toggle' is rendered, so TEST 3 (5 sections) and TEST 4 (collapsible Coachs persistance) FAIL. ROOT CAUSE: AttendancePage's `members` query does not include coaches (coaches live in a separate /api/coaches collection), so sections['Coach'] is an empty list, and the rendering loop `if (list.length === 0) return null` (AttendancePage.js:384) skips the entire Coach section header. All other Sprint C functionality works: Onboarding category filter (Tous/Partenaire/IFRC/OpenGym/Coach) renders correctly with dedup (1 ligne par couple) and purple '& X • DUO' badges; Attendance has HG(53)/IFRC(12)/Challenge(2)/Partenaire(23 rows + 11 DUO badges); Courses widget shows all 6 category cards with exact expected counts; non-régression on /members /coaches /archives all OK. SECONDARY ISSUE: dev-server compile-time error overlay '[eslint] Failed to load config react-app' (eslint-config-react-app package missing from node_modules) — runtime still works from last-good build but HMR is broken and overlay obscures the page until dismissed.

tests_executed.TEST 1 — Backend endpoints: PASS — GET /api/members/categories returns 124 entries with full mapping (category/duo_partner_id/duo_partner_name/is_primary_in_duo). GET /api/members/categories/stats returns {HG:53, Coach:25, Partenaire:12, IFRC:12, OpenGym:7, Challenge:2, Pret:1, Inconnu:1, total:113} — exact match with spec.
tests_executed.TEST 2 — Onboarding category filter: PASS — data-testid='onboarding-category-filter' present. Default 'Tous (par défaut)' = 54 rows (excludes OpenGym/Pret/Inconnu). Partenaire filter = 12 rows + 12 duo-pair badges (dedup 1 ligne/couple OK). OpenGym filter = 5 rows. IFRC filter = 0 rows (IFRC members already completed onboarding, none pending — acceptable). Sample duo-pair badge text 'Cindy & Alexis Cabassot & Bolle • DUO' contains the partner full-name from backend (note: name appears to include '&' as separator in source data — verify with main agent if visual cleanup is desired).
tests_executed.TEST 3 — Attendance 5 sections: PARTIAL FAIL — Found 4/5 sections in correct visual order: HG(53)→IFRC(12)→Challenge(2)→Partenaire(23 rows). MISSING: data-testid='attendance-section-coach'. Coach members (25 expected) are not rendered as a section because AttendancePage members source does not fetch coach records. OpenGym/Pret/Inconnu correctly absent. Counts in present headers exactly match spec.
tests_executed.TEST 4 — Coachs collapsible: FAIL (blocked by TEST 3) — data-testid='attendance-coaches-toggle' is absent because the entire Coach section is not rendered (empty list short-circuits the section in AttendancePage.js:384). localStorage key 'attendance_coaches_section_expanded' was never written/read because the toggle is unreachable.
tests_executed.TEST 5 — Partenaires DUO regroupement vi: PASS (logic) — 23 rows in Partenaire section. 11 'DUO' badges via data-testid='duo-badge-{member_id}' rendered ONLY on primary rows that have a paired secondary directly after (per AttendancePage.js:444 `isDuoPrimary && hasPairedSecondary`). Purple bg-[rgba(191,90,242,0.04)] + border-l-[#BF5AF2] applied to all partenaire rows (verified via inspection of class strings in AttendancePage.js:421-427). Note: 23 rows = 11 complete couples (22 rows) + 1 unpaired partenaire (1 row) — partner likely archived. 11 badges = correct (only paired primaries get DUO badge).
tests_executed.TEST 6 — Saisie indépendante DUO: NOT EXECUTED — skipped to preserve test budget; the underlying input mechanism (per-row data-testid='attendance-row-{member_id}' with separate onBlur handlers) is structurally sound based on code review at AttendancePage.js:430-465 (each row has its own POST /api/trainings via the existing per-cell save flow). Recommend manual verification.
tests_executed.TEST 7 — KPIs Cours category widget: PASS — data-testid='category-stats-widget' present. All 6 cards found: category-stat-hg(53), category-stat-coach(25), category-stat-partenaire(12), category-stat-ifrc(12), category-stat-opengym(7), category-stat-challenge(2). Exact counts match spec.
tests_executed.TEST 8 — Non-régression: PASS — /members loads (body length 10583), /coaches loads (1084), /archives loads (15825) and shows 'Membres 207' tab + 'Coachs 0' (matches spec's 207 archived members). No JS errors in console.
tests_executed.TEST 9 — Teo Succi (Inconnu): PASS — Teo Succi NOT visible in /onboarding under 'Tous (par défaut)' filter (Inconnu correctly excluded). Inconnu option correctly absent from the Select dropdown (only HG/IFRC/Partenaire/Challenge/Coach/OpenGym are listed).

ui_bugs.issue: Coach section completely missing from grid — no data-testid='attendance-section-coach' and no data-testid='attendance-coaches-toggle' rendered. Spec requires 5 sections (HG/IFRC/Challenge/Coachs/Partenaires) but only 4 are visible. The 25 coaches expected to appear under the collapsible Coachs section are absent entirely.

integration_issues.flow: AttendancePage member source does not include coaches
integration_issues.issue: AttendancePage queries /api/members which excludes coaches; coaches are in a separate /api/coaches collection. As a result sections['Coach'] is always an empty array, AttendancePage.js:384 returns null for empty sections, and the Coach section never renders (header + toggle absent).

issues: [eslint] Failed to load config 'react-app' to extend from. Referenced from: /app/frontend/package.json — eslint-config-react-app package is missing from node_modules. CRA build still serves last-good bundle so the runtime works once the overlay is dismissed, but HMR is broken and the red overlay covers the page on first load. Fix: yarn add -D eslint-config-react-app, or relax the eslintConfig.extends in package.json.

Sample duo-pair badge text 'Cindy & Alexis Cabassot & Bolle • DUO' shows that some partner full-names already contain ampersands. The badge prefix '& ' then renders awkwardly. Cosmetic — verify if the source name field needs cleaning or if the badge format should change.

action_items: CRITICAL: Add coach members to AttendancePage's data source (merge /api/coaches results into the member list, or add a dedicated coaches query and inject them with category='Coach' before sectioning). Without this fix, TEST 3 (5 sections) and TEST 4 (Coachs collapsible + localStorage persistence) cannot be validated end-to-end.

Resolve dev-server eslint compile error: run `yarn add -D eslint-config-react-app` in /app/frontend (or remove 'react-app' from eslintConfig.extends). The overlay obscures the page on every cold load and HMR is broken — slows down all future testing.

Optional: review the partner full-name source for entries that contain '&' (e.g. 'Cindy & Alexis Cabassot & Bolle') — the prepended '& ' in the OnboardingPage DUO badge then reads as '& Cindy & Alexis & Bolle' which is visually noisy.

Optional: TEST 6 (DUO independent input save) was not executed automatically — recommend a quick manual check that Marie=2/Jean=0 in the same week column in the Partenaire section produces 2 separate POST /api/trainings calls (one per member) and that totals update independently.
critical_code_review_comments: AttendancePage.js:382-384 — `if (list.length === 0) return null` silently drops empty sections. For the Coach section this hides a real data bug (no coaches in the input list) instead of surfacing it. Suggest at minimum logging a console.warn when an expected section is empty, or always rendering the header with '0' so the missing-data condition is visible.

AttendancePage.js — the section construction relies on category lookup via useMemberCategories which keys by member.id. If coaches are not in the `members` array passed to the categorizer, they will never appear regardless of backend stats showing Coach=25.

OnboardingPage.js:412-416 — the duo-pair badge renders as `& {duo_partner_name} • DUO`. When duo_partner_name contains '&' (e.g. couple names already concatenated upstream), the visual becomes confusing. Consider trimming or using a different separator.

package.json eslintConfig — extends ['react-app'] but eslint-config-react-app is not in dependencies and not present in node_modules. This breaks the dev server's lint pass and produces a full-page red overlay on every page load. Either install the dep or drop the extends entry.

AttendancePage.js — file is in the 500+ line range with section logic + DUO grouping + collapsible state inline. Per the 700-line guideline this is still acceptable, but the sectioning sub-tree could be extracted into <AttendanceSection> + <AttendanceRow> for readability.

success_rate.frontend: TEST1 PASS, TEST2 PASS, TEST3 PARTIAL (4/5 sections, Coach missing), TEST4 FAIL (blocked by TEST3), TEST5 PASS, TEST6 NOT EXECUTED, TEST7 PASS, TEST8 PASS, TEST9 PASS — 6 PASS / 1 PARTIAL / 1 FAIL / 1 SKIP = 67% strict pass rate, 78% if PARTIAL counted as pass

test_credentials: antoine.paucod@the-coach.pro / TheCoach1290. (Super Admin); Versoix club via [data-testid='club-option-transform-versoix']
seed_data_creation: None. No mutations performed (TEST 6 saisie was skipped).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login lands on '/' (not '/dashboard'). Club switcher = [data-testid='club-selector'] → click [data-testid='club-option-transform-versoix']. The dev-server eslint compile overlay hides the page initially — dismiss with `await page.evaluate("() => document.querySelectorAll('iframe').forEach(f => f.remove())")` after every page load. AttendancePage data-testids use SINGULAR lowercase: 'attendance-section-coach' and 'attendance-section-partenaire' (NOT plural). Coach section is currently NOT in the DOM — once main agent fixes the coach data source, retest [data-testid='attendance-coaches-toggle'] click → localStorage 'attendance_coaches_section_expanded' write → page reload → state persists → coach rows hidden/visible accordingly. TEST 6 (DUO independent saisie) still needs end-to-end coverage with a real input + onBlur + 2 POST /api/trainings assertions, with cleanup to restore initial values.
rca of the issue: Coach section missing from /attendance: AttendancePage feeds its sectioning logic from a `members` array that comes from `/api/members` (regular member endpoint). Coaches are stored in a separate collection accessed via `/api/coaches`. The backend stats endpoint /api/members/categories/stats correctly reports Coach=25, but those 25 coach IDs are never emitted into the attendance page's per-member array. The categorizer hook then has no Coach-category entries to attribute, sections['Coach'] = [], and AttendancePage.js:384 (`if (list.length === 0) return null`) drops the entire section header + collapsible toggle from the DOM. Fix: extend the AttendancePage data fetch to merge /api/coaches results into the displayed members (with category Coach pre-attributed) before sectioning, OR change the /api/members/categories endpoint to also include coach IDs and update the members fetch to include coaches when sectioning is on.
